name: All-Purpose Barbecue Rub
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a small bowl.
2. This rub makes 1 cup and can be used on just about anything that you plan to barbecue, which involves cooking over low, indirect heat for an extended period of time.
3. For large red-meat roasts such as leg of lamb or standing rib, increase the cayenne pepper from 1 teaspoon to 1 tablespoon and substitute 1 teaspoon cinnamon for the ground cloves.
